safeCourtLine: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that custody extract is served, BWV is referred only, and full custody record and interview material remain outstanding.
safePositionToday: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that custody extract is served, BWV is referred only, and full custody record and interview material remain outstanding.
